programme.desc: Cat poses as an ace surfer to woo a pretty Surfer Girl, who promises to be his queen if he can surf the "big" wave. To Cat's dismay, Dog follows his instincts and chases a dragonfly all over the house.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: It's Jolly Olde England and Rancid Rabbit is king. Meanwhile, CatDog are living the life of lowly garbage pickers. Cat and Dog both fall in love with Loraine Dejardin, who likes opera and playing fetch.

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug is getting notes from a secret admirer. His first guess is Patti, but then he finds out it's Beebe! Doug's aunt, Betty-Ann, is a TV producer, and she has a special present for him: tickets to the Kiddie Corral!

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Roger prepares his spitballs, kick me signs and bully attitude for the new kid in school. When the kids criticize Mr. Bone's dull school-news video show, he makes the mistake of challenging them to do a better one.

programme.title: Doug

programme.title: Doug

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug wants to raise enough money to buy a new skateboard and sets up a lawnmowing enterprise to do so. Everyone is talking about the final scene in the latest horror flick. But Doug closed his eyes and missed the ending.

programme.title: Doug

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug is nominated for class treasurer, and when he finds himself against Willie White, the mayor's son, he starts making campaign promises he knows he can't fulfill in order to win. Doug beats Patti in a bowling match.

programme.title: Doug

programme.desc: Doug Can't Dig It/Doug Didn't Do It: Doug is mortified when his sister Judy plans to perform at a school assembly, and he has to introduce her. Roger steals Vice-Principal Lamarr Bone's yodelling trophy, but all the evidence points to Doug.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!

programme.desc: For their science fair project, Arnold and Gerald planned to lock themselves in Grandpa's dilapidated greenhouse in the backyard for twenty-four hours.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!

programme.desc: When two hip older teenagers scoff at Kenan and Kel for being too young to get into a real club, the boys set about making their dance club -- in Rigby's.

programme.desc: The President of the United States makes a visit to Rigby's during a stop in Chicago. While walking through the store, he falls prey to a toppling display of orange soda cans the boys have erected.

programme.desc: Although she's too young for a driver's license, Clarissa is consumed by the desire to acquire a 1976 Gremlin she finds in the want-ads.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Haunted House: Clarissa is faced with the terror of a visit from her Canadian Aunt Mafalda, who's capable of hugging the life's blood out of helpless young relatives. Clarissa enlists Ferguson's help in trying to scare Aunt Mafalda out of the house.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: New Addition: Using her deductive powers, Clarissa determines that her parents are having a baby.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Brain Drain: An I.Q. test result has Ferguson believing that he is really a genius.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El palacio del enigma
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony deben confiar en un sociópata que afirma tener pruebas para condenar a un asesino. Además, Frank se enfrenta a la reacción de su departamento cuando suspende a un agente por comportamiento violento.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A plena vista
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se enfrentan a la tarea de localizar a un traficante de drogas después de que dos jóvenes modelos aparezcan muertas por sobredosis. Además, Eddie y Jamie se unen para determinar quién es el autor intelectual de un robo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Secretos de familia
programme.desc: Después de obtener una coincidencia de un pariente desconocido de una red de ADN, Sean Reagan investiga para averiguar quién podría ser esta persona misteriosa.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Varias parejas que están en proceso de adoptar niños en Seattle empiezan a ser asesinadas. La UAC busca a un criminal que tiene un perfil muy pronunciado de instinto maternal, aunque asesino. Por otro lado, García tiene miedo de hablar con Kevin.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un niño llamado Ángel aparece en medio del desierto con profundas cargas psicológicas al haber sido capturado por un psicópata. El niño no puede articular palabras, pero él es el único que puede dar una pista para salvar a otro niño desaparecido.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Oregon es encontrada muerta en un asilo, la UAC se da cuenta que la víctima es parte de una serie de asesinatos rituales góticos y que el asesino podría ser satanista.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La hermana de Morgan ve a una muchacha que se parece a su prima supuestamente muerta. Morgan tiene que confesar a su familia la mentira que él dijo, y el UAC vuelve a abrir el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un infante de marina, el equipo de NCIS descubre un laberinto de cámaras espías que transmiten en vivo, escondidas en las habitaciones de un motel de Virginia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un músico de la banda más elitista de la Armada que actúa en eventos diplomáticos en todo el mundo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un suboficial que se transmitió en vivo en una popular aplicación de juegos. Además, Gibbs cuidará a su vecino de 11 años, Phineas (Jack Fisher), porque su madre debe irse en un viaje de última hora.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo ayudan a Ziva (Cote de Pablo) con “la única cosa” de la que dijo que tendría que encargarse antes de regresar con su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A plena vista
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se enfrentan a la tarea de localizar a un traficante de drogas después de que dos jóvenes modelos aparezcan muertas por sobredosis. Además, Eddie y Jamie se unen para determinar quién es el autor intelectual de un robo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Secretos de familia
programme.desc: Después de obtener una coincidencia de un pariente desconocido de una red de ADN, Sean Reagan investiga para averiguar quién podría ser esta persona misteriosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Amidst a shifting political climate, Frank goes head to head with City Council Speaker Regina Thomas (Whoopi Goldberg) over protests against police brutality.

programme.title: Una lección de vida

programme.title: Otoño en Nueva York

programme.desc: Cuatro valientes y aguerridas mujeres pelean contra una pandilla de criminales que quiere apoderarse de una valiosa fórmula de un científico.

programme.desc: Un hombre es enviado a vender el ganado de un tío, pierde todo el dinero en el juego e inventa que fue asaltado.

programme.title: Besos que matan

programme.title: Telaraña
programme.desc: Después de la horrible muerte de su compañero, el detective y escritor Alex Cross se ha refugiado en la paz de su retiro. Pero cuando un criminal brillante (Michael Wincott) secuestra a la hija de un senador, Alex debe volver a la acción.

programme.title: Doble riesgo
programme.desc: Judd interpreta a Libby Parsons, condenada por asesinar a su esposo. Descubre que él falsificó su propia "muerte" y la incriminó. En libertad condicional, se propone a buscarlo, y le deja pistas a su agente Travis Lehman (Jones).

programme.title: Barreras
programme.desc: Situada en Pittsburgh en los años 50, la adaptación para cine de la obra de August Wilson ganadora de un Pulitzer muestra al exjugador de béisbol Troy Maxson mientras lucha por sustentar a sus seres amados en un mundo que amenaza con derribarlo.

programme.title: Cuando los hermanos se encuentran
programme.desc: Tom Cruise interpreta a un comerciante de ruedas egocéntrico que descubre que tiene un hermano autista (Dustin Hoffman) y lo lleva a un viaje inolvidable por todo el país en esta histérica, profunda y conmovedora ganadora del Oscar® a la Mejor Película.

programme.title: El pequeño Tate
programme.desc: Jodie Foster protagoniza junto con Dianne Wiest, este drama que afirma la vida sobre una madre soltera y su hijo, un niño prodigio que se siente aislado, perdido y solo, hasta que Dede se da cuenta de lo que Fred ha necesitado todo el tiempo.

programme.title: Todo Corazón
programme.desc: Basada en el relato de Mariane Pearl sobre la terrible e inolvidable historia de su esposo, el periodista del Wall Street Journal Danny Pearl, su vida y su muerte.

programme.title: Las horas
programme.desc: Tres mujeres en diferentes épocas que se relacionan por un paralelismo en sus vidas personales. Una organiza una fiesta para un amigo con SIDA. Otra, en 1949, sufre como esposa joven. La última, Virginia Woolf, cuando escribe "La señora Dalloway".

programme.title: Barreras
programme.desc: Situada en Pittsburgh en los años 50, la adaptación para cine de la obra de August Wilson ganadora de un Pulitzer muestra al exjugador de béisbol Troy Maxson mientras lucha por sustentar a sus seres amados en un mundo que amenaza con derribarlo.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky (ESP)
programme.desc: Joven y próspero, David puede tener todo lo que desee su corazón. Pero su vida parece estar incompleta. Una noche, David conoce a la mujer de sus sueños y cree que puede haber encontrado la pieza que le faltaba.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: Asesino a Sueldo
programme.desc: Slevin (Josh Hartnett) se marcha de Los Ángeles, por un error de identidad cae en medio de una guerra entre los dos jefes criminales más temidos de la ciudad: El rabino (Ben Kingsley) y el jefe (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico sólo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narco.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: Al calor de las armas
programme.desc: Dos criminales secuestran a la mujer equivocada.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: código sombra
programme.desc: El suspenso no se detiene mientras el recluta de la CIA Ryan queda atrapado en una peligrosa red de intriga y espionaje. Ryan debe pasar de soldado a analista, a agente operativo para detener un complot terrorista devastador contra EE. UU.

programme.title: Juegos de patriota
programme.desc: Jack Ryan se ve envuelto en un atentado terrorista, ayuda a frustrar a los agresores de Holmes y se convierte en un héroe local, pero su acto lo convierte en un blanco. Ahora debe regresar a la acción para salvar a su familia.

programme.title: Peligro inminente
programme.desc: Cuando su mentor, el almirante James Greer, se enferma, Ryan es nombrado director en funciones de la CIA.

programme.title: Impacto profundo
programme.desc: Cuando un par de jóvenes astrónomos descubren un cometa enorme en peligro de colisionar con la Tierra, empieza la cuenta regresiva hacia el apocalipsis y la raza humana se embarca en la lucha por la supervivencia.

programme.title: La sublevación de los oceanos
programme.desc: Un científico construye un arca enorme después de que se ignoran sus advertencias de una inundación que destruirá la Tierra. El desastre es inevitable, y los que difamaron al científico suben al arca desesperados, antes de que el mundo se ahogue.

programme.title: Rugrats la película: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Con el nacimiento de su nuevo hermano Dylan, Tommy Pickles sabía que las cosas iban a cambiar, pero nunca esperó que ser un hermano pudiera ser tal aventura.

programme.title: Bob Esponja, la película
programme.desc: Él es la loca estrella submarina de un océano lleno de aventuras, él es Bob Esponja en su debut en la película original!

programme.title: Bob Esponja: un héroe fuera del agua
programme.desc: Con la misión de salvar su mundo, ¡Bob Esponja se dirige al nuestro por primera vez en la vida! Cuando el pirata Barba Burger roba la receta de las Cangreburger, Bob Esponja y sus amigos se transformarán en superhéroes para vencer al supervillano.

programme.title: El núcleo
programme.desc: La Tierra deja de rotar por un cambio en la temperatura del centro del planeta. Para solucionarlo, los astronautas deberán viajar al centro, y detonar una bomba nuclear antes de que el centro se sobrecaliente y destruya toda la vida en la superficie.

programme.title: La isla
programme.desc: Un hombre huye tras descubrir que en realidad es un “ser clonado”, y permanece junto a otros en un lugar único.

programme.title: La Pantera Rosa 2
programme.desc: Steve Martin vuelve a divertirnos encarnando al torpe Inspector Jacques Clouseau. Esta vez debe descubrir quién ha robado la Pantera Rosa, un diamante de valor inestimable, y otros tesoros del mundo. Coprotagonizada por Jean Reno y John Cleese.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película
programme.desc: Cuando se roban su TV, Beavis y Butt-head emprenden camino en una hilarante película debut que les muestra a millones de fanáticos lo que ya saben: ¡Beavis y Butt-head son le mejor!

programme.title: Día de pinta
programme.desc: Ferris Bueller, más grande que la vida. Bendecido con un sentido mágico de descubrimiento, es un modelo a seguir para aquellos que se toman a sí mismos demasiado en serio. Un hombre que sabe el valor de un día libre.

programme.title: Norbit (ESP)
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: Un príncipe en Nueva York
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy hace el papel de un príncipe africano muy rico y mimado que va a los Estados Unidos en busca de una novia, y rápidamente encuentra un trabajo, nuevos amigos, nuevos gustos, nuevos enemigos y muchos problemas.

programme.title: Mi papá y nuestro mundo fantástico
programme.desc: ¿Qué pasaría si la imaginación de tu hija fuese el secreto de tu éxito? Cuando un hombre de negocios ve que su imperio financiero se derrumba, busca ayuda en su hija y en su mundo de fantasía.

programme.title: Ma Ma
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Penelope Cruz delivers the performance of her career as Magda, a woman who is determined to live life to the fullest in the face of her recent breast cancer diagnosis. In

programme.title: Neruda
programme.desc: At the start of the Cold War, subversive Chilean senator and poet Pablo Neruda is pursued by police prefect Oscar Peluchonneau. Unable to flee the country, Neruda goes into hiding and becomes a symbol of liberty at home and in Europe.

programme.title: Las horas contigo
programme.desc: Eva debe aprender a lidiar con un embarazo no deseado frente a la muerte inminente de su amada abuela y arreglar su relación con su madre separada.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: A la mala
programme.desc: En esta brillante comedia, una bella actriz perseverante (Aislinn Derbez) es contratada para coquetear y luego abandonar a un apuesto ex productor, pero se termina enamorando de él.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Testigo
programme.desc: La viuda y madre de tres hijos, Annie Wilson, se gana la vida adivinando el futuro de los demás... a pesar de que el suyo se ha tornado más confuso de lo que ella misma puede ver.

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: Una joven manifiesta estigmas como los que Jesucristo sufrió en su cricifixión. Ni médicos ni psiquiatras pueden darle ninguna explicación, sólo un sacerdote enviado por el Vaticano la ayudará, aunque tenga que ir en contra de algunas de sus creencias.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: EL Ojo (2008)
programme.desc: Una chica ciega recibe un trasplante de córnea para poder recuperar la vista. Sin embargo, recibe más de lo que esperaba cuando se da cuenta de que puede ver inquietantes fantasmas.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: Cuando su amigo hacker accidentalmente canaliza una misteriosa señal inalámbrica, un grupo de estudiantes se reúnen para detener a un terrible mal que se apodera del mundo.

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: The Cowboy And The Indians
programme.desc: Gene Autry runs in to opposition when he tries to aid starving Navajos. The Chief is found unconscious and his necklace gone. Lakohna, the successor, is blamed. Gene and Lakohna join to seek justice.

programme.title: Beyond The Purple Hills
programme.desc: Gene Autry becomes the new Sheriff after bank robbers kill the former sheriff. When Judge Beaumont is murdered, evidence points to the judge's wild son. Believing the young man, Gene tries to help.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Adios, Sabata
programme.desc: Under the brutal rule of garrison leader Col. Skimmel, a group of Mexican revolutionaries hire gunslinger Sabata (Yul Brynner) to rob a transport of gold in order to buy weapons. But the Colonel has other plans...taking the gold for himself.

programme.title: Along Came Jones
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

programme.title: Thunder Road (1958)
programme.desc: Lucas Doolin (Robert Mitchum) runs moonshine across the mountain back roads, dodging the law and the lawless alike. With government agents closing in on him, it seems the county may run dry--but Doolin slams the pedal to the metal for one last run.

programme.title: The Night Of The Hunter
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum stars in an unforgettable role as a psychopathic preacher in relentless pursuit of two children who have their dead father's stolen fortune hidden in a doll. Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: David and Lisa
programme.desc: The story of a young man in a mental institution for teens who begins to understand his psychosis and finds intimacy with Lisa, a young woman suffering from dissociative identity disorder.

programme.title: Elmer Gantry
programme.desc: A Best Actor Oscar went to Burt Lancaster for his outstanding performance as a con-man-turned-preacher in this provocative indictment of religious corruption.

programme.title: Hud
programme.desc: Hud Bannon (Paul Newman) is the rebellious son of a respectable rancher who’s continually at odds with his aging father. Patricia Neal and Melvyn Douglas co-star, in their Oscar®-winning roles.

programme.title: Sweet Smell of Success
programme.desc: A columnist and a press agent tear into the maelstrom of midtown Manhattan's night creatures in a sinister game that involves money, power and ultimately survival.

programme.title: Solomon and Sheba (1959)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner as the wise leader and singer of songs, Solomon, who finds his world turned upside down with the appearance of the wily temptress Sheba (Gina Lollobrigida). George Sanders, Marisa Pavan, David Farrar, and Harry Andrews co-star.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer saves an old horse from the glue factory and tries to hide her at the base.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A heat wave hits New York, putting all of the Bunkers in bad moods and, to put salt on an already open wound, the air conditioner breaks down.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The new neighbors, Irene and Frank Lorenzo, settle into the house next door. Soon Archie is annoyed with both of them, as Irene makes friends with Edith and Archie soon grows jealous of all the time that Edith is spending with her.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Thanks to an investment made by their accountant, Maude and Walter unwittingly became part owners of a ghetto tenement.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude accompanies Walter to an out-of-town business convention where they find themselves trapped in a shoddy, run-down motel room. The crummy motel room triggers a squabble over why Walter had never invited Maude to go to conventions with him before.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter's 50th birthday is near and everyone except Walter is excited, so Maude plans a surprise birthday party for him. As the happy day arrives Walter goes into a deep depression and even Maude's special surprise gift fails to achieve the desired effect.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Walter are within hours of leaving for a second honeymoon in Italy when Maude develops a rash. Dr. Tasko's treatment stops the rash but marks the beginning of a malpractice suit.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When fire damages his house, Arthur moves in temporarily with Maude and Walter, a move which wreaks havoc on the already battle-scarred Findlay household.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Florida discover that male chauvinistic pigs come in all colors when Florida's husband demands she stops working for white people.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: A pro hockey player hits Oscar and Felix, trying to patch things up, winds up challenging the athlete to a boxing match.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar become roommates in the hospital in Hospital Mates.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix's pet parrot takes a turn for the worse, and Oscar, who never liked the bird, offers to handle the burial arrangements.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Over Oscar's objections, Felix recounts to their dates how they met while serving on a jury.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike decides to teach Sally how to fish.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike's Japanese ex-girlfriend comes to town.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve's former sweetheart is now a princess.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Bub joins a women's group to save a tree.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Unable to control her curiosity, Laura opens Rob's mail and she instantly regrets it!

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob's dentist pal, Jerry, strains the friendship when he starts knocking Rob's television show in public.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Buddy ignores Rob's efforts to collect an old debt.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: When his show announces a talent contest, Rob finds himself besieged by the parents of neighborhood prodigies.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: High- schooler Betty Jo poses as a college coed to gain the interest of a handsome college boy.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Jo takes pity on the only boy in her home economics class and induces her mother to help him win a passing grade.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Four cons escape and their longtime prison guard dedicates himself to bringing them back personally, frustrating Stone and Robbins who are perpetually one step behind the man who knows his prisoners' every probable move.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mike and Dan pursue a smuggler who will stop at nothing to locate a dog collar containing stolen diamonds.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When a police officer is fatally shot three days before he is due to retire, Stone undertakes a relentless search for the killer.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone and Keller finally get a lead on a serial killer who has been killing prostitutes when one of the victims survives an attack.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When Mannix tries to find out what a disturbed little girl knows about her murdered doctor and $150,000 in stolen bonds, they both become marked for assassination.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Peggy and her son are held hostage by men who want the evidence that Mannix has, that proves his detective friend was murdered.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A controversial television interviewer telephones a shadowy figure named Harry Armitage for the "hot seat" segment of his show, accusing Armitage of bribery and influence peddling.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A young woman who has entered a county fair competition in a rural community north of Los Angeles disappears, and her wealthy father hires Joe Mannix to look for her.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: J.R.'s friend is wrongly accused of assaulting a man who later dies. Making matters worse, he ran from the scene of the crime making him look guilty. J.R. does every thing he possibly can to help his friend clear himself.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby is conned into helping another private investigator find a missing girl. But he's not honest with Barnaby about all that is involved with her disappearance or that he's tried to extort money from the people that are looking for her.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: J.R, poses as a photographer to find out why a man broke into the real photographers studio and was desperate enough to throw acid on her to get away with the negatives from her last photo shoot.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A young up and coming singer hires Barnaby to find her manager after he disappears with money that she paid him to have a potential hit song produced and recorded. Together they discover the seamier side of the music business.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A police informer tells McGarrett that one of the jurors in the murder trial of island strong-arm has been bribed in an effort to produce a hung jury.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A double amputee sets out to avenge the loss of his hands by killing every law officer who, he feels, contributed to his maiming.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Leland confesses to killing Jacques Renault. Andy wants to take a new sperm count test. Rumor spreads that a food critic is coming to Twin Peaks. Jean asks Ben to set a trap for Cooper in exchange for Audrey's life.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Cooper discovers he had forgotten about the message under his bed. Shelly and Bobby begin Leo's home care. Sternwood hears pretrial motions and declares Leo not fit for trial. Nadine comes home, still thinking she's in high school.

programme.title: The Commish: The Commissioner's Ball
programme.desc: A serial killer has been mutilating the bodies of Eastbridge transients and homeless people -- and Tony begins to suspect the perpetrator's identity.

programme.title: The Commish: No Greater Gift
programme.desc: During the holiday season, Tony investigates the murder of an elderly woman allegedly killed in her home during a Christmas burglary.

programme.title: The Commish: The Fourth Man
programme.desc: After Commissioner Scali's friend and colleague, Chief of Detectives Irv Wallerstein, is struck down during a bloody encounter with hijackers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An explosion at Community General leaves Agent Wagner with minor bruises, but he prepares himself for the grim task of searching for Amanda and her friends amidst the rubble.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While Dr. Sloan impatiently waits for Community General to reopen, Caitlin Sweeney resurfaces as a member of R.O.A.R. (Revolutionary Order for Armed Rebellion).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's Cindy Garrett and Philip Kobler's wedding day and they're taking "til death do us part" literally, when they plan the murder of Cindy's father to take place right after their nuptials!

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble witnesses an accidental killing and learns an innocent man is charged with murder because of it.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: To his amazement, Richard Kimble finds himself sworn in as a lawman.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble reads that his dad Dr. John Kimble has retired, and fears that the news may mean illness for the old man.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Harvey (John Karlen) disagrees with the outcome of an investigation after a former colleague falls to his death at a construction site. Harvey recruits Mary Beth (Tyne Daly) to help him investigate what he believes to be a murder.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: After three women are found strangled, Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate whether or not there is a connection between the attacks and an erotic hotline. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are assigned by Internal Affairs to check out a security leak among the 14th Precinct's personnel, forcing the duo to reluctantly spy on their colleagues. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver battles the mob while protecting an elderly couple who have unwittingly become mixed up in a syndicate counterfeiting operation.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When Kelly's modeling school closes down, she gets a new job as a greeter at the TV World theme park. When this is threatened by her low-performance ratings, Kelly is moved into Commercial Land where she plays "the Verminator" who hunts down roaches.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When Al can't pay his bill at the gas station, he is forced to don a uniform and work at the station. He spends the day being hounded by motorists, as well as Peg and the kids.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Lower Uncton, England 1653-- Seamus McBundy makes the mistake of insulting a witch who casts an evil spell upon the land, shading the town in darkness forever--as long as a male Bundy lives.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Bundys delight in their comped trip to England, spending here and there. All the while, the town of Upper Uncton conspires to kill the Bundys outside Lower Uncton, so the curse will remain and Upper Uncton can still rake in profits as a tourist town.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Bundys are cornered by both towns. Upper Uncton wants them dead so they can continue to profit as a tourist trap while Lower Uncton wants them dead so they can end the curse.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Cissy meets some flower children in the park and wants to be one of them. Uncle Bill is none too pleased.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Movie producer Fred Wallace spots Mr. French in the park and thinks he would be perfect to play Henry VIII in his new production. The very proper French flatly declines. After some convincing by his friends and family, he agrees to do it.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: After being read Treasure Island, Dennis and Tommy become fascinated with buried treasure.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis uses his friend’s remote control to operate Mr. Wilson’s television from his house, and Mr. Wilson can’t understand what’s happening.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis asks a reporter to write a story about his dad with hopes of getting his picture in the paper.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Margaret Goes Dancing
programme.desc: Margaret is sure she could never get Jim to agree to take dancing classes with her.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: The Christmas Story
programme.desc: In an attempt to remind his family of the real meaning of Christmas, Jim decides the Anderson's will cut down their own Christmas tree this year.

programme.desc: Steve has to go to Japan for business and decides to bring the boys along.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.desc: Police in Overland Park, Kansas, hunt for over 15 years for a serial killer who lures women to Kansas for sadomasochistic sexual trysts at hotels.

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The murder of a 73-year-old man leads police on a long chase for a man who's suspected of identity theft and bears a rose tattoo with the name "Phyllis".

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: DNA evidence found on a murder victim whose body had been dumped in a Dairy Queen drive-thru leads to the arrest of Houston's notorious "tourniquet killer."

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A detective works for 15 years to nab a man who murdered and dismembered his wife to hide the sexual abuse of his children. Then, 20 years after the shooting murder of a gas station attendant, detectives get a lead.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl's mother is murdered and 20 years later she helps bring the killer to justice, and a dogged policeman gets to the bottom of the brutal murder of a 63-year-old newspaper delivery woman.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A quarter of a century after the murders of two nurses, Canadian police suspect that a former Toronto cop committed the crimes. A blow to the head of a garbage collector in San Jose leaves strange markings.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police must wait nearly 30 years before advances in DNA technology give them the chance to convict the killer of a young hitchhiker, and Philadelphia police wage a 16-year hunt for the man who raped and killed a 10-year-old girl.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In December 1985, when human bones are discovered in the woods, it puts an end to the search for missing teen David Reed. David's skull fractures point to murder; but it will be decades before investigators can find his killer.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: After a nearly disastrous driving lesson, Daria debates whether to switch from glasses to contacts, and Kevin experiments with a new accessory.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: When Daria volunteers at a retirement home, she discovers that her tone makes her as unpopular with the senior citizens as it does with her peers.

programme.title: Daria

programme.title: Daria

programme.title: Daria

programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la noche de Halloween de 2004, Adriane Insogna y Leslie Mazzara fueron brutalmente asesinadas en su casa de Napa, California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de un rico empresario estadounidense fue encontrado en su auto de alquiler. Los dientes y fragmentos de huesos fueron los únicos restos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una peluquera joven y atractiva fue agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su propio salón de belleza. La evidencia en la escena del crimen no coincidió con ninguno de los sospechosos y, después de la investigación inicial, el caso se archivó por diez años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dentro de un cabello
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva al caso del violador de River Park, que asaltó a cuatro mujeres en South Bend, Indiana, durante 1996. Los agentes del orden arrestaron a Richard Alexander, quien fue declarado culpable en 1998 y sentenciado a 70 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Llamado desde Casa
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato en Florida atraviesa jurisdicciones de New York y Jamaica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, cuando la adolescente Tara Munsey desapareció al salir de su trabajo en un restaurante de Virginia, no se sabe si se escapó o si fue víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer fue brutalmente asesinada en su casa y los únicos testigos del crimen fueron los perros de la familia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un hombre desaparece un año después de haber comenzado una aventura con la esposa de su amigo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Post preparó un baño para su esposa antes de salir a correr. Regresó y la encontró sin respirar. Murió antes de que llegara la ambulancia. La policía consideró su muerte como accidental hasta que surgió un motivo.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 20 rookies try to master a socially distanced version of the famous kick line and some intricate choreography, and Kelli helps the ladies get fitted for uniforms.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies outshine the veterans when choreographer Travis Wall teaches a sexy dance number, and Kelli and Judy give some of the vets a wake-up call.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Casting Special
programme.desc: From twins to super freaks, peep the girls vying for Flav's heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: In Flav We Trust
programme.desc: Flavor Flav has put his heart on the line three times only to have it handed back to him. But he is willing to give it one final go – swearing he'll find true love or die trying!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Pimp My Gurney
programme.desc: Waking up with 15 girls, Flav quickly presents their first challenge. Flav's looking for a girl that can mend his broken heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Flav asks the remaining 13 girls to create a theme restaurant for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Things That Go Bump On The Lip
programme.desc: Flav splits his ladies up into two teams for the first ever Flavorette Roast Challenge. Each team picks one girl from the other team to put in the hot seat, and they cut loose with a full on verbal beatdown.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Lyin The Witch And The Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for someone who can be a mother as well as a mate, so he has the girls create a bedtime story for a group of children.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Dial M For Mystery Pimp Caller?
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for a woman with the “Total Package.” And now, with only eight women left in his house, he has devised the “Total Package Challenge” to judge who offers the most.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Halitosis Ohmyosis
programme.desc: Flav challenges the final six girls to a calendar shoot showing off the bodies of the year.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: A Night At The Hip Hopera
programme.desc: With the latest twist still fresh and furious on the Flavorettes' minds, two new alliances quickly form in the house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Flav is so smitten with the remaining nine girls that he's going to marry them!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Neverwed Game
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls are in for a big surprise when they find themselves on the set of the first ever “Neverwed Game” starring Arsenio Hall as the host and their own ex-boyfriends!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: When Flavorettes Attack
programme.desc: Flav bring his five remaining girls to "Big Boy's Neighborhood" on LA's biggest Hip Hop Radio Station to have live callers help him decide which girl is right for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Its A Family Flav Fair
programme.desc: With only four women left vying for Flav's affection the moment of truth has arrived, meeting the parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Von Boyage
programme.desc: After the last elimination, Flav tells his final three girls to pack their bags because they are heading to Cannes, France!

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisation's religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: From the statues of Rameses II to the final flourishes under Queen Cleopatra, Sooke discovers that the subsequent invasions by foreign rulers, from the Nubians and Alexander the Great to the Romans, produced a new hybrid art full of surprise.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.desc: Dancers are unable to let go during an erotic dance and Sage demands that they go out in search of their sensuality; things heat up between Dondre and Poppy; Sage and Rigo compete.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: As Nine encourages Sage to moderate his ambitions, Collette takes him on a journey into the past, to rediscover his artistic origins; Odalie finds it difficult to find balance in her love life and dance; Zo takes Tal out to have fun a night.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tal discovers a terrible family secret; Sage and the dancers develop a new and risky concept; Nine helps Rigo deal with his feelings for Poppy, while Poppy and Dondre confront their own feelings for each other.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Odalie tries to overcome an injury and preserve her place on the tour; Tal tries to relieve the guilt she feels and deserve Odalie's forgiveness; Rigo finds it difficult to maintain peace among his friends and find out who to trust.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: With Rigo's music about to go viral, Poppy is left with no choice but to respond; Collette takes control of the tour while Sage is away; Davis helps Uncle Al outside of work.

programme.desc: Grace takes Rochelle up on her offer to help start a legal defense fund; Bishop and Lady Mae ask if parishioner Clara Jackson's Powerball winnings can assist with their IRS bill.

programme.desc: The Bishop sends Lady Mae into a tailspin when he surprises her with divorce papers; Grace gives a newspaper interview in Mae's place, while deploying Darius to investigate Rochelle.

programme.title: Tekken: Kazuya's Revenge
programme.desc: A defenseless man is kidnapped by an organized crime syndicate and turned into a ruthless assassin.

programme.title: DOA: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The world's best fighters are invited to DOA, a martial-arts tournament. Four female rival fighters, an aristocratic warrior, a wrestling superstar, an athlete with a tragic past, and an assassin-for-hire, work together to uncover a secret.

programme.title: The King of Fighters
programme.desc: The surviving descendants of three legendary clans are transported to other dimensions to test their martial arts skills against an evil force that seeks to invade and overrun the world as we know it.

programme.title: Highlander IV: Endgame
programme.desc: Two worlds come together when HIGHLANDER big-screen star Christopher Lambert teams up with HIGHLANDER television series star Adrian Paul to combat a fearsome villain and his ruthless band of immortals.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: In this fantastical action film, martial arts legend Jackie Chan stars as a police inspector tracking down a deranged villain who is out to kidnap his daughter.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks and her unborn child were brutally murdered. The body was discovered by her fiancé, Keyon Pittman. When police learned that Pittman was having affairs with other women, he became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: After being admitted to the hospital with unexplained bleeding, 11-month-old Chad Shelton dies. Investigators and scientists frantically search for a cause when others from the same house fall ill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, 6-year-old Cassie Hansen disappeared from her Minnesota church during an evening service. After receiving a tip that an older man was seen carrying a small person, police found Cassie's body in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day; this time, the victim survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A movie contract for Ricky necessitates a change in scenery and the hanging of a "for rent" sign on the Ricardos' New York home. The Mertzes, willing to give up tenants but not friends, sign on for the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For their trip out west, Ricky buys a new car to replace the old, beat-up one Fred bought. Lucy convinces her husband to teach her how to drive it. After one driving lesson, Ricky is a harried and beaten man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's mother wants to join the Ricardos on their road trip out west. As anticipated, Ricky blows his stack when he hears that Lucy's mother wants to go along, and continues to complain that everyone's going on the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes are arrested when they're caught speeding in Bent Fork, Tennessee. Although Ricky just wants to pay the fine, Lucy protests that they are being treated unfairly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.desc: Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.desc: Identificar restos quemados: es difícil investigar un asesinato si no hay cuerpo, y quemar a la víctima es un método tradicional de destruir pruebas físicas.

programme.desc: Laval the Lion and Cragger the Crocodile are the best of friends. But when young Cragger becomes king of the Crocodiles, he tries to conquer all the Chi. Former friends become the worst enemies.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: King Cragger’s mischievous sister Crooler uses a mysterious plant to cloud Cragger’s mind. This causes him to cause mayhem at the ceremonial CHI day Speedor races, and he plans a massive attack on the Lion Temple.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
